metadata.what_it_measures: Federal Reserve total assets (WALCL) as a percent of nominal GDP. Tracks QE expansion and QT contraction of the Fed balance sheet.
metadata.why_it_matters: A rising balance sheet (QE) is accommodative; a falling balance sheet (QT) is restrictive. The year-over-year change in the ratio signals the direction of monetary policy transmission independent of the fed funds rate.
